creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #4)

I finally noticed that the "crash" was specifically an Assertion failure (from the log file):

Assertion failed: (VDecl->isLinkageValid()), function DeduceVariableDeclarationType, file /usr/local/poudriere/jails/main-amd64/usr/src/contrib/llvm-project/clang/lib/Sema/SemaDecl.cpp, line 12705.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.freebsd.org/submit/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.


So probably my context was without Assertions but the official builds
have Assertions enabled. My notes questioning the status of the
FreeBSD build server's ZFS file system may be just junk relative to
the actual problem.
